title: Mace Mastery
description: Gives the 1.21 Mace two new skills: the high-flying Wind Leap and the ground-shattering Seismic Slam!
body:
**⚔️ Mace Mastery ⚔️**
Unleash the Storm and Shatter the Ground!

Tired of the Mace only being useful when falling? Mace Mastery is a lightweight, vanilla-plus plugin that gives the new 1.21 Mace two powerful, configurable skills. Make your players feel like true warriors!

✨ **Features**
Mace Mastery adds two active abilities, both triggered while holding the Mace and Sneaking (Shift).

**1. Wind Leap (Shift + Right-Click)**
🚀 Launch yourself into the air with a powerful gust of wind! This skill allows you to initiate a devastating Mace attack from anywhere, even flat ground.

**Action:** _Shift + Right-Click_

**Effect:** _A vertical leap into the air._

**Visuals:** _Swirling CLOUD particles and a windy TRIDENT_RIPTIDE sound._

**Cost:** _Has a configurable cooldown._


**2. Seismic Slam (Shift + Left-Click)**
💥 Slam your Mace into the ground, creating a shockwave! This Area-of-Effect (AoE) attack damages and knocks back all nearby enemies, giving you room to breathe.

**Action:** _Shift + Left-Click_

**Effect:** _Damages and knocks back enemies in a radius._

**Visuals:** _Ground-shattering BLOCK particles and a heavy WARDEN_ATTACK_IMPACT sound._

**Cost:** _Has a configurable cooldown._


Why Choose Mace Mastery?

✨**Truly Vanilla-Plus:** Feels like a natural extension of the Tricky Trials update.

🎛️**Fully Configurable:** Don't like the damage? Think the cooldown is too long? Change everything!

⚙️**Simple & Lightweight:** No complicated setup. Just drop it in your plugins folder. Built to be fast and lag-free.


🔌 **Compatibility**
**Minecraft Version:** 1.21.x (1.21, 1.21.1, etc.)

**Server Type:** Spigot, PaperMC, and any forks (Purpur, etc.)
